title: Multi-Hop Factual Reasoning CSD Sampling Experiment (6 Difficulty Levels)
summary: Demo notebook analyzing pre-computed LLM responses to multi-hop factual reasoning questions across 6 difficulty levels for 3 models (Llama-3.1-8B, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash). Demonstrates the full CSD (Critical Slowing Down) analysis pipeline: answer extraction via fuzzy matching, sentence embedding computation, CSD indicator battery (variance trace, Hartigan dip, silhouette, bimodality coefficient, Ashman D, self-consistency disagreement), cross-level Kendall tau trend analysis, and multi-panel visualization. Uses 18 curated examples (1 per model×level) with 10 responses each from the full experiment output.
